creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-16 17:07:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal5-cck      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  The Content Construction Kit allows you create and customize fields using a web
  browser. In Drupal 5.x custom content types can be created in core, and CCK
  allows you to add custom fields to any content type.
  
  WWW: http://drupal.org/project/cck
  
  PR:             ports/120580
  Submitted by:   Jeremy Iverson <jeremy at algenta.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1981    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/www/drupal5-cck/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/drupal5-cck/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/drupal5-cck/pkg-descr (new)
